name: project-steward
description: Cross-agent project stewardship: interactive init, repo-resident progress tracking, crash-resilient session handoff/resume, and task-backend guidance.
claude_description: Cross-agent project stewardship: interactive init (AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md), repo-resident progress tracking, crash-resilient cross-tool session handoff/resume, and a task-backend broker. State lives in .project-steward/ and travels via git. Native Windows requires the project-steward CLI on PATH (pipx install project-steward); POSIX hosts run hooks via a bundled python3 shim fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-resident project memory, handoff, and progress tracking.
interface.longDescription: Project Steward helps coding agents initialize durable project memory, resume from repository state, keep progress current, and hand off cleanly across Claude Code, Codex, and other agents.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repo with Project Steward.
